title: 10 best herbal teas for palpitation
description: Passiflora incarnata, also known as maypop, teas helps with palpitation because of its unique ability to interact with the nervous system and regulate heart rate. The herbal tea contains flavonoids and alkaloids that have a sedative effect, which can help calm the mind and body, leading to a decrease in palpitations. Additionally, Passiflora incarnata has been traditionally used to reduce anxiety and stress, which are common triggers for palpitations. By promoting relaxation and reduci...
